name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
description: Crispy sourdough topped with fresh heirloom tomatoes, garlic, and fragrant basil drizzled with extra virgin olive oil.

name: Burrata e Prosciutto
description: Creamy burrata served with thinly sliced prosciutto di Parma, roasted cherry tomatoes, and balsamic glaze.

name: Zuppa di Funghi
description: Velvety wild mushroom soup with truffle oil, topped with herb croutons and crème fraîche.

name: Filetto di Manzo
description: Prime 8oz beef tenderloin, pan-seared to perfection, served with truffle mashed potatoes and seasonal vegetables.

name: Branzino al Limone
description: Whole roasted Mediterranean sea bass with lemon, capers, herbs, and a white wine reduction.

name: Pappardelle al Cinghiale
description: Hand-rolled pappardelle with slow-braised wild boar ragù, fresh herbs, and aged Pecorino Romano.

name: Melanzane alla Parmigiana
description: Layers of grilled eggplant with San Marzano tomato, fresh basil, buffalo mozzarella, and Parmigiano-Reggiano.

name: Tiramisù Classico
description: Our timeless tiramisu with mascarpone cream, espresso-soaked ladyfingers, and a dusting of dark cocoa.

name: Panna Cotta ai Frutti di Bosco
description: Silky vanilla panna cotta crowned with a vibrant wild berry compote and fresh mint.

name: Fondente al Cioccolato
description: Warm chocolate lava cake with a molten dark chocolate centre, served with Madagascar vanilla gelato.

name: Negroni Classico
description: Campari, sweet vermouth, and gin stirred over ice with an orange peel garnish.

name: Acqua di Rosa
description: House-crafted rose water spritz with elderflower, cucumber, and a splash of Prosecco.
